summary: Dan Shapiro shares a link to a Popular Woodworking nesting tables project that appeals to him as a weekend build. He notes his intent to use solid spalted maple boards he already has on hand, showing his preference for quality materials over the project's default specs. The post is a brief, casual entry reflecting his maker hobby interests.
key_points: Shares a woodworking project for nesting tables from Popular Woodworking magazine
Wryly notes that a 'weekend project' might actually be completable in a weekend
Plans to upgrade the material to solid spalted maple from his personal stock
money_quotes: A weekend project that you might even be able to finish in a weekend!
If I make it, it'll be out of solid maple, though… gotta do something with these 20″x6'6″ spalted maple boards I've got!
key_insight: A brief snapshot of Shapiro's maker side, showing his hands-on woodworking hobby and preference for quality materials.
